sourceAmbiguity: Real provider configuration can be delayed by credentials, billing, sender verification, or DNS setup.
decisionTaken: The task ships a local control board, selector manifest, validator, and Playwright harness that run now with all live mutations blocked.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The shared operating contract requires mock-first and gated-live execution for external configuration tasks.
operationalRisk: Waiting for live credentials would leave callback topology and evidence capture untested until late integration.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: When a provider sandbox is available, add sandbox-specific selectors while retaining dry-run evidence requirements.
